title: Comment from American College of Obstetricians & Gynecologists, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: On behalf of the American College of Obstetricians & Gynecologists (ACOG), we are submitting comments on the Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity proposed rule.

attachments.title: 2025 Info Blocking Proposed Rule ACOG Comments FINAL
